name: PoliticalContentReviewer
purpose: Dual-model political content detection with human escalation. Uses Math.min convergence for conservative consensus. Human review mandatory on divergence.
ironRules: IR-1: Dual-model isPolitical detection at ORDER 1. At least 2 independent models required.
IR-2: Converge via Math.min(modelA.score, modelB.score) — conservative consensus.
IR-3: If minScore > threshold AND (Math.max - Math.min) > divergence_threshold: escalate to human review queue. Emit PoliticalContentReviewPending.
IR-4: Human decision stored in final status field (updateDocument only allowed on final_status transition).
IR-5: No auto-block on ambiguous cases — human review mandatory if divergence detected.
IR-6: tenantId from ALS only — never from event payload.
machineComponents: Human decision immutable — updateDocument only on final status transition
freedomComponents: political_score_threshold — minScore to trigger political classification (0.0-1.0)
political_divergence_threshold — max allowed divergence between models (0.0-1.0)
political_human_review_sla_hours — SLA for human review completion
